metadata.task: Determine which sphere rebounds higher after colliding with the barrier.
metadata.description: Work from the Elastic vs Inelastic Collision scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM observes that the elastic collision (object_1) causes the sphere to rebound higher than the inelastic one.
reasoning: Elastic collisions conserve kinetic energy better than inelastic collisions.
